REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING [HEARING: MAY-24-23 @ 1:30PM];DOCUMENT LABELED "FAX" FILED BY PLAINTIFF REASOR, DARRAH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-12-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-12-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF DARRAH REASOR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE FLENTROY (CLAIMS ADJUSTER) WITH WITNESS ERIC GUAJARDO. COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FILED ON MAY-04-2023 TO AMEND PARTY NAME, DEFENDANT'S NAME IS AMENDED FROM SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. THE COURT DECLINES TO PERMIT LILY KAPLAN (SUMMER LITIGATION INTERN) TO REPRESENT THE CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS IMPROPER PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 AND CCP 116.530. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REASOR, DARRAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
